questionHtml: Calculate the standard electrode potential, in V, when the Fe2+ (aq) | Fe (s) and Cu2+ (aq) | Cu (s) standard half-cells are connected at 298 K. Use section 24 of the data booklet.

meta.title: Calculate the standard electrode potential, in V, when the Fe2+ (aq) | Fe (s) and Cu2+ (aq) | Cu (s) standard half-cells are connected at 298 K. Use section 24 of the data booklet.
